title: Single character alternations in regular expressions should be replaced with character classes
description: Avoid using single character alternations in regular expressions. Instead, use character classes to describe the accepted characters.
message: Single character alternations in regular expressions should be replaced with character classes
recommendation: Replace single character alternations with character classes

noncompliant.description: Single character alternation with the pipe symbol

why_is_this_an_issue: Single character alternations can make regular expressions less readable and more prone to errors
how_to_fix: Replace single character alternations with character classes

metadata.title: Single character alternations in regular expressions should be replaced with character classes
